title: ContourLoadSet
description: ContourLoadSet: A set of uniform loads to be applied in the gravity direction over a region defined by a closed planar Polyline.

UniformLoadSet.description: A UniformLoadSet containing a list of uniform loads to be applied in the gravity direction UniformLoadSet: Definition of a set of uniform loads in the gravity direction (-Z).

Contour.description: Closed planar polyline enclosing the region to be loaded. Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
